privileged_info_summary: Task.json contains no metadata field. The task uses real data: landscape images downloaded from Unsplash (photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 and photo-1501594907352-04cda38ebc29). Both images are confirmed to be real landscape photographs in landscape orientation (800x533 and 800x450 pixels) with good contrast variation suitable for threshold conversion. GIMP's Threshold tool is a verified real feature accessible via Colors→Threshold menu that converts images to high-contrast black and white by setting intensity threshold ranges. The verifier checks for bimodal histogram distribution, contrast improvement, binary dominance (≥80% black/white pixels), and meaningful image modification (≥10% pixel change). Data source is external and public (Unsplash), not synthetically generated.
